items.title: Helping developers build safer AI experiences for teens
items.summary: OpenAI releases prompt-based teen safety policies for developers using gpt-oss-safeguard, helping moderate age-specific risks in AI systems.
items.cn_title: OpenAI助开发者打造更安全的青少年AI体验
items.cn_summary: OpenAI推出了基于提示的青少年安全策略，以gpt-oss-safeguard辅助开发者，有助于调节AI系统中与年龄相关的特定风险。

items.title: Powering product discovery in ChatGPT
items.summary: ChatGPT introduces richer, visually immersive shopping powered by the Agentic Commerce Protocol, enabling product discovery, side-by-side comparisons, and merchant integration.
items.cn_title: ChatGPT升级 打造视觉沉浸式购物体验
items.cn_summary: ChatGPT通过Agentic Commerce协议引入更丰富的视觉购物体验，支持产品发现、直观比较和商家集成功能。

items.title: Building AI-powered GitHub issue triage with the Copilot SDK
items.summary:
Learn how to integrate the Copilot SDK into a React Native app to generate AI-powered issue summaries, with production patterns for graceful degradation and caching.
The post Building AI-powered GitHub issue triage with the Copilot SDK appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
items.cn_title: 利用Copilot SDK打造AI辅助的GitHub问题分类
items.cn_summary: 了解如何将Copilot SDK集成到React Native应用中，以生成AI驱动的问题摘要，并采用优雅的降级和缓存方案。GitHub Blog首发。

items.title: Update on the OpenAI Foundation
items.summary: The OpenAI Foundation announces plans to invest at least $1 billion in curing diseases, economic opportunity, AI resilience, and community programs.
items.cn_title: OpenAI基金会拟投10亿美元支持四大领域
items.cn_summary: OpenAI基金会宣布，将至少投资10亿美元于疾病治疗、经济机会、人工智能韧性和社区项目，以推动相关领域进步。

items.title: Google TV’s new Gemini features keep fans updated on sports teams and more
items.summary: Three Gemini-powered features are coming to your Google TV. This includes visual responses, deep dives, and sports briefs.
items.cn_title: 谷歌电视更新Gemini功能 体育队况快速掌握
items.cn_summary: 谷歌电视即将推出三项Gemini功能，包括视觉响应、深度剖析和体育简讯，让球迷和用户能够及时了解体育队伍、娱乐和其他信息。

items.title: OpenAI adds open source tools to help developers build for teen safety
items.summary: Rather than working from scratch to figure out how to make AI safer for teens, developers can use these policies to fortify what they build.
items.cn_title: OpenAI推出开源工具助力青少年网络安全
items.cn_summary: 开发者不再需要从头开始研究如何使AI更安全地服务于青少年，而是可以直接利用OpenAI提供的策略来增强他们所构建的产品。

items.title: Anthropic hands Claude Code more control, but keeps it on a leash
items.summary: Anthropic’s new auto mode for Claude Code lets AI execute tasks with fewer approvals, reflecting a broader shift toward more autonomous tools that balance speed with safety through built-in safeguards.
items.cn_summary: Anthropic为Claude Code新增自动模式，简化AI执行任务审批流程，展现向更自主工具转变的趋势，同时内置安全措施确保平衡速度与安全性。

items.title: OpenAI’s plans to make ChatGPT more like Amazon aren’t going so well
items.summary: OpenAI says it's moving away from Instant Checkout, which allowed users to buy items directly through the ChatGPT interface.
items.cn_summary: OpenAI宣布将不再支持通过ChatGPT界面直接购买商品的即时结账服务，进一步明确其AI发展方向。

items.title: GitHub expands application security coverage with AI‑powered detections
items.summary:
CodeQL and AI‑powered detections work together in GitHub Code Security to identify vulnerabilities across more languages and frameworks.
The post GitHub expands application security coverage with AI‑powered detections appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
items.cn_title: GitHub通过AI增强安全防护覆盖范围
items.cn_summary: GitHub Code Security采用CodeQL和AI检测技术，识别更多语言和框架中的漏洞，扩大应用安全覆盖面。

items.title: A New Framework for Evaluating Voice Agents (EVA)
items.cn_title: 评估语音助手的新框架EVA问世
items.cn_summary: EVA为评估语音智能助手提供新框架，旨在衡量这些助手的能力、效率和用户体验，进一步推动语音技术发展。
